meta.question: Where is the APS model located in the packge hierarchy?
meta.finalAnswer:
The APS (Alignment and Phasing System) model is located within the TMT project hierarchy, primarily under the following path:

`TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System`

Specific packages and views related to APS are organized within this branch, such as:
- `TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::09 Views::TMT-APS-SE`
- `TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS`

These paths indicate that the APS model is structured as a component within the Telescope control work packages.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The initial search identified several elements related to 'APS'. I need to map the properties of one of the core 'APS' packages to understand its hierarchy and location. I will select one of the packages identified in the previous step to explore its properties.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: I have identified the properties of the 'APS' element. Now I will perform a targeted query to find the owner of the 'APS' package to understand its position in the hierarchy.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?ownerName ?qualifiedName WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS" .
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?elem vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qualifiedName }
}
LIMIT 5

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?name ?qualifiedName WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qualifiedName .
}
LIMIT 10

request.reason: The qualified names of the packages containing 'APS' clearly show their location within the TMT project hierarchy, primarily under 'TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System'. I have sufficient information to answer the user's question.

- `TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS`
